My Resources

These are all of the resources I have used to create my website portolio.

I used ChatGPT to help me with a few things that I was unsure how to do. For example, ChatGPT helped me to create my sidebar.

I used ChatGPT to help me with my sidebar as well as little fixes I was unsure how to do.

Click here to view my conversation with ChatGPT

I also used ChatGPT to assist me with enhancing my table for my projects page.
